title: Building a VWMA Crossover Signal EA in MQL5
subtitle: Volume-Weighted MA(20/60) Crossover + SR Filter, Closed-Bar, ATR SL
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: LOW-MEDIUM EXTRACT — VWMA formula validated (sum(close*vol)/sum(vol)). SR_LookBack=50 + SR_OffsetPips=3 adds structural filter on top of MA cross. VWMA is superior to SMA as momentum indicator because it weights price by volume activity.
vwma_formula: VWMA = sum(close[i] * volume[i] for i in range(period)) / sum(volume[i] for i in range(period))

SR_OffsetPips.description: Price clearance from S/R before signal fires

keep: SR_OffsetPips clearance pattern — signal fires only after clearing S/R by offset
discard: MA cross as primary signal (too slow for our M1 system)
improve: VWMA as alternative to EMA3: more responsive to high-volume bars. Replace EMA3 with VWMA(3) for volume-weighted momentum
SR clearance logic: add to zone exit detection — signal only fires when price has CLEARED zone boundary by ATR*0.3
